# MCP Time Server Conversion Tests
# Tests time conversion between various timezones and edge cases

# Build the time server binary
go build -o mcp-time-server .

# Test conversion across date line (UTC to Pacific)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"23:45","target_timezone":"US/Pacific"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"timezone":"US/Pacific"'

# Test conversion with midnight edge case
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"00:00","target_timezone":"Europe/Paris"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'

# Test conversion with noon
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"America/New_York","time":"12:00","target_timezone":"Asia/Shanghai"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Shanghai"'

# Test with 30-minute offset timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"15:30","target_timezone":"Asia/Kolkata"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Kolkata"'

# Test with 45-minute offset timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"UTC","time":"10:15","target_timezone":"Asia/Kathmandu"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"time_difference"'
stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Kathmandu"'

# Test bidirectional conversion (same time zones reversed)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"Europe/London","time":"16:00","target_timezone":"America/New_York"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"timezone":"Europe/London"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'

# Then reverse the conversion
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"America/New_York","time":"16:00","target_timezone":"Europe/London"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"timezone":"Europe/London"'
